Messages.Text: Hello, I am from IT department. Pleasure to meet you.
This chat terminal serves as a way for the station to communicate with you.
We will provide you with important information about your case or just help in general.
I have sent you a file to help you get familiar with the basics of a 'File Manager' app.
Please open it when you have the time.
Good day, I may have accidentally installed a virus in my system.
Could you please help me?
Hello, sorry to hear that.
I have taken a liberty of installing a software called 'Virus Finder'.
Please run it and delete any viruses it may find on the desktop.
good day
glad you could figure out the file manager. some morons cant even do that
anyway your first task is to help us catch an online scammer
i have sent you an email that we managed to get our hands on. you can open it in the file manager
try to find anything useful about the scammer or the victim itself
Hello, I have managed to find the email address of the victim. thomas.bare@gmail.com
I have also managed to find the name of the scammer. It's "Albert Green"
the name could and likely is fake
but i can add the thomas bare email to your contacts. try to see if hes of any help
good job
I managed to contact Thomas Bare and in response he sent me a file that seems to be just random noise.
Do you think it could be useful?
hmm... hard to say
ill send it to our specialists. they might be able to extract something from it
ill let you know when i hear back from them
Hello, I have clicked the link in the encrypted file you've sent me.
what? i didnt send you anything, what are you talking about?
There was a file from you that contained a link to click.
That link crashed my PC.
are you sure it was from me?
because i have no idea what youre talking about
you sure youre not being scammed yourself?
listen, you might have just installed a virus.
message the IT dpt about this immediately and have them check your system
So I've contacted the IT department and they helped me remove the viruses from my PC.
I should be good to go now.
great, next time dont click on every random bullshit you see
continue working on the case and report back any findings
Hey, so Thomas Bare, the suspect, just seemed to message me some weird things.
Actually, it sounds like he might be in trouble.
what are you talking about?
I'm not sure how to describe it, his messages were just weird and now he's not responding to me at all.
maybe he just lost connection or something
Maybe, still, could we get someone to check on him? I think he might be in danger.
okay send me those messages and ill see if i can do something about it
Alright, sending them now, thanks.
hey so we managed to pull a file presumed to be from the scammers pc
according to our source, it might be a screenshot of the scammers desktop
unfortunately he seems to have encrypted it in some way with a password that we dont have
Well, that's unfortunate...
yeah but our source tells us that the password is a combination of the scammers and and birth year
Oh? That's interesting, do we know that information?
wouldnt be writing you if we did now would I?
but we managed to get a few more files from the scammers computer
two of them seems to be an email exchange between the scammer and someone else
the other one seems to be a screenshot of the scammers messaging app
if you find anything else useful in them let us know
sending them to you now. try to look if you could find anything useful in them
I have managed to find the password and decrypt the image.
{0}The picture seems to be a screenshot of MY desktop [Truth] || {1}It doesn't look familiar at all [Lie]
Good day, sir.
Good day. Who are you?
I work for the police department, we are investigating an online scam case.
We have reason to believe you might be a victim of one, since your email was found in connection to it.
Have you recieved a suspicious email recently?
I don't know how you got that email, but yes, I did.
I have not responded to that offer though.
Actually I wrote to the actual devs asking them about this and they confirmed that it was a scam.
Interesting, and did they say anything else that might be useful?
Not really, they just told me to ignore and delete such emails in the future.
But alongside that email, I also recieved another file.
It seems to just be a random noise. I can send it to you if you want.
Yes, please do. It might be useful.
Alright, sending it now.
Thank you for your cooperation.
You're welcome. Have a good one.
Hello, are you there sir?
Good day, yes I am, is there anything you need?
My computer started to act a bit okay after our interaction
I'm sorry?
It has worked normally a several times and there are some normal behaviours.
I'm not sure I follow...
I think it started not doing anything my texts
Okay, try contacting a specialist to look at your PC.
Okay, so I should just open it and it will fix everything?
What? No, don't open anything.
Yes, that worked, thank you for your help.
What are you talking about???
Hello???
DO NOT DELETE MY FILES
DO NOT TELL HIM THE TRUTH
DO NOT MENTION IT'S YOUR COMPUTER
Good day sir, you have been talking about Thomas being in danger.
You were right, he was not supposed to write that.
Just don't worry about it for now, keep doing detective stuff.
